User.title: User Profile
User.description: Information about an artist or user.

uid.description: The unique ID of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

photoURL.description: The URL of the user's profile picture.

bio.description: A short biography of the artist.

Project.title: Art Project
Project.description: An art project uploaded by a user.

id.description: The unique ID of the project.

title.description: The title of the art project.

imageUrl.description: The URL of the project's image.

category.description: The category of the project (e.g., 3D, Illustration).

authorUid.description: The UID of the artist who created the project.

likesCount.description: The number of likes the project has received.

Like.title: Project Like
Like.description: A like interaction between a user and a project.

userId.description: The UID of the user who liked the project.

projectId.description: The ID of the project that was liked.

/users/{uid}.description: User profiles stored by their UID.

/likes/{likeId}.description: Likes on projects, ID is usually userId_projectId.
